description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 23 hrs 48 mins of coding time, averaging 3 hrs 13 mins per day. His activity spanned 6 projects, with most of the tracked language time in Java (38%), followed by Other (32%), Markdown (16%), and TypeScript (5%). GitHub activity in the provided data shows no commits, pull requests, or new repositories.
